findings.description: Complete absence of standard AGENTS.md files at repository roots.

tasks.description: Create AGENTS.md in dev-environment following the open-standard (build/test/style).
Propagate AGENTS.md to all 9 repositories as root context files.
Create .github/copilot-instructions.md in common-bond to define global architectural guardrails.

findings.description: No standard .github/agents/ directory for specialized task instruction files.

tasks.description: Implement .github/agents/ in common-bond and dev-environment using the Microsoft Cluster Doctor pattern.

findings.description: No existing standard for agent-authored GitOps PRs for automated remediation.

tasks.description: Propose a design for a 'Cluster Auditor' agent that can generate remediation PRs in documentation/common-bond.

findings.description: Lack of 'Permissions & Safety' governance for autonomous agents. (Iterative Improvement Proposal)

tasks.description: Establish a Permission and Safety standard for agentic platform tools, defining read-only vs. write-scoped credentials and required human gates.

findings.description: Absence of 'Reference Implementation' pointers in documentation for agentic imitation. (Iterative Improvement Proposal)

tasks.description: Identify one 'canonical' service for each technology stack (Python, Next.js, Supabase) and tag as reference implementation for AI tool context.

findings.description: No standard for 'Agentic CI/CD Gates' like AI-driven test healing. (Iterative Improvement Proposal)

tasks.description: Prototype a 'Test Healer' workflow integration using Playwright's agentic capabilities in planner-frontend.

findings.description: Outdated/Missing openapi.json or schema.sql exports in non-local shared locations. (Iterative Improvement Proposal)

tasks.description: Standardize the generation and publishing of OpenAPI specs and SQL schemas for every compute service.

findings.description: Inconsistent error message formatting across repos. (Iterative Improvement Proposal)

tasks.description: Enforce a standardized structured logging (JSON) format across all Python services to improve agentic root cause analysis.

findings.description: Lack of standardized 'Agentic Contracts' for shared services (Supabase, Match, Planner).

tasks.description: Standardize the .agents/contracts.md format across all shared compute and data services.

findings.description: No mechanism to distinguish agent-initiated mutations in logs from human actions. (Round 2 Addition)

tasks.description: Define a standard X-Agent-ID header and logging convention for all autonomous tools.

findings.description: Absence of a centralized machine-readable registry of agentic capabilities. (Round 2 Addition)

tasks.description: Create a root-level capabilities.json mapping personas to specific skills and workflows.

findings.description: No automated benchmark to verify agent performance against domain-specific problems. (Round 2 Addition)

tasks.description: Establish a 'Gold Standard' regression suite for the Planner and Allocator domains.

findings.description: Lack of structured 'PITFALLS' documentation for AI agents. (Round 2 Addition)

tasks.description: Standardize a CONSTRAINTS.md file for every repository specifically for non-obvious AI pitfalls.

findings.description: Manual rotation of high-privilege agent credentials. (Round 2 Addition)

tasks.description: Implement automated secret rotation for autonomous tools using Vault and GitHub Actions.

implementationPhases.description: Implement AGENTS.md and copilot-instructions.md across all repositories.
implementationPhases.rationale: Foundational context files are required before specialized agents can operate reliably.

implementationPhases.description: Define specialized agent personas and diagnostic workflows.
implementationPhases.rationale: High-level orchestration and specialized personas enable autonomous remediation.
